title: Data Governance Catalog v1
description: Custom A2UI v0.9 catalog for the Data Governance chat. Declares the components that back the LangGraph request-access interrupts so the frontend can render them through the official A2UI renderer. Keep component names in sync with the Angular catalog registration in frontend/client/src/app/a2ui/datagov-catalog.ts.

FacetChipRow.description: Row of selectable chips used for single-facet questions such as 'Which domain?' or 'What anonymization level do you need?'. Fires the ``facet.select`` event with the clicked chip's id in ``context.value``.

prompt.description: Human-readable prompt shown above the chip row.

facet.description: Facet id (``domain`` / ``product_type`` / ``anonymization``) echoed back in the select event.

options.description: Chip list bound to a data-model path pointing at an array of ``{id, label}`` objects.

onSelect.description: Action fired when the user taps a chip. The Angular implementation merges ``context.value`` = clicked chip id at dispatch time.

ProductPicker.description: Multi-select product picker. Renders one card per product (id, type pill, content snippet, domain · sensitivity) plus three action buttons. Selection state is owned by the renderer (not round-tripped through the agent on every click) and only the final picks are emitted via the ``onConfirm`` action. Used as the A2UI v0.9 replacement for the legacy ``product_selection`` interrupt.

products.description: Data-model path to the array of normalized product dicts ({content, metadata: {id, product_type, domain, sensitivity}, score}).

confirmLabelTemplate.description: Template for the primary button label. Token ``{count}`` is replaced with the current selection count by the renderer.

onToggle.description: Optional informational action fired on each card click; the renderer merges ``context.value`` = clicked product id. The chat host currently ignores this — selection lives client-side until ``onConfirm``.

onConfirm.description: Action fired when the primary button is tapped. The renderer merges ``context.products`` = the full list of selected product dicts at dispatch time.

onOpenSearch.description: Action fired when the ``Open Search Panel`` button is tapped.

onRefine.description: Action fired when the ``Refine Filters`` button is tapped.

MessageBanner.description: Single-line banner used for lightweight status / intro lines above an input. Purely presentational.

text.description: Banner text. Supports the same markdown subset as the legacy chat bubbles.
